name: Form: Create

description.en: Create a new form. After creating, use 'Add Field' to define the inputs.
description.de: Ein neues Formular erstellen. Danach mit 'Feld hinzufügen' die Felder definieren.

bot: Use this to create a new form. The definition must follow the warp definition schema exactly: { "name": "<internal English name>", "title": { "en": "...", "de": "..." }, "description": { "en": "..." }, "actions": [{ "type": "collect", "label": { "en": "Submit", "de": "Absenden" }, "inputs": [] }], "messages": { "success": { "en": "Thanks! We'll be in touch soon.", "de": "Danke! Wir melden uns bald." } } }. Do not invent other fields. After creating, use form-field-add to add each field.

inputs.name: Definition
inputs.bot: The full warp definition object for this form.
